name: paddleocr-doc-parsing
tagline: CLI wrapper that extracts structured Markdown/JSON (tables, formulas, layout) from PDFs and document images via the PaddleOCR doc-parsing.
verdict: Well-documented API wrapper: concrete commands, a shown output schema, and explicit error guidance. Weak spots: no negative-trigger/exclusion text, no version or changelog signal, and the bundled paddleocr install is unpinned to a specific version.

highlights.summary: official uv install of well-known package but no version pin — 'latest' drift risk.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere in the file, unlike the sibling text-recognition skill.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
